creator: vsityz@gmail.com
text:
After upgrade world (r244396M), headphones on front panel not working anymore.
If module snd_hda unload and load module from /boot/kernel.old
headphones on front panel is working fine.

egrep pcm /var/run/dmesg.boot 

pcm0: <Sigmatel STAC9271D (Analog 5.1+HP/2.0)> at nid 13,16,15,10 and 14,12 on hdaa0
pcm1: <Sigmatel STAC9271D (Front Analog Mic)> at nid 11 on hdaa0
pcm2: <Sigmatel STAC9271D (Rear Digital)> at nid 33 on hdaa0


sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1

Dumping AFG pins:
nid   0x    as seq device       conn  jack    loc        color   misc
10 0221401f 1  15 Headphones    Jack  1/8     Front      Green   0
11 02a19040 4  0  Mic           Jack  1/8     Front      Pink    0
12 0181302e 2  14 Line-in       Jack  1/8     Rear       Blue    0
13 01114010 1  0  Speaker       Jack  1/8     Rear       Green   0
14 01a19020 2  0  Mic           Jack  1/8     Rear       Pink    0
15 01111012 1  2  Speaker       Jack  1/8     Rear       Black   0
16 01116011 1  1  Speaker       Jack  1/8     Rear       Orange  0
17 42214020 2  0  Headphones    None  1/8     Front      Green   0 DISA
18 400000fc 15 12 Line-out      None  Unknown 0x00       Unknown 0 DISA
33 01452150 5  0  SPDIF-out     Jack  Optical Rear       Grey    1
34 400000fd 15 13 Line-out      None  Unknown 0x00       Unknown 0 DISA
NumGPIO=3 NumGPO=0 NumGPI=0 GPIWake=1 GPIUnsol=1


sysctl -a | grep hda

dev.hdac.0.%driver: hdac
dev.hdac.0.%location: slot=27 function=0 handle=\_SB_.PCI0.AZAL

dev.hdacc.0.%desc: Sigmatel STAC9271D HDA CODEC

dev.hdacc.0.%location: cad=2
